faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about my work, experience, and how we can collaborate together.

q1.question: Who are you and what do you specialize in?
q1.answer: I'm a passionate full-stack developer specializing in building modern web applications with React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. I focus on creating scalable, user-centric solutions that solve real-world problems.

q2.question: What technologies do you work with?
q2.answer: I work with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Git. I'm always exploring new technologies to stay current with industry best practices.

q3.question: Are you open to relocation or remote roles?
q3.answer: Yes, I'm open to both remote and on-site opportunities. I'm flexible with relocation for the right role and thrive in collaborative, forward-thinking environments.

q4.question: Can you work in team environments?
q4.answer: Absolutely. I have strong experience working in agile teams, participating in code reviews, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. I value clear communication and shared ownership.

q5.question: How can I contact you quickly?
q5.answer: You can reach me via email at my portfolio contact form, LinkedIn, or GitHub. I typically respond within 24-48 hours and am always open to discussing new opportunities.
